title: Allow custom color for all color by
excerpt: Currently when gantt chart color by “Owner” the colors are automatically assigned by monday.com. There is no way to customize the color for the owner/team.

posts.author: davidtio (David Tio)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently when gantt chart color by “Owner” the colors are automatically assigned by monday.com. There is no way to customize the color for the owner/team.
